github_commit_message: feat: per-candidate r_m5 from micro, add pool_size_total/pool_size_with_micro fields
vps_local_commit_message: feat: add feature_tape_v1 and health report (deployed via SCP)
working_tree_note: VPS git repo has its own local commit history driven by automated DB backup commits (every 30 min). The VPS repo is not pushed to GitHub. Deployment workflow: write code locally -> push to GitHub (canonical) -> SCP to VPS -> commit locally on VPS. GitHub commit (deb7cdc) is the source of truth. The deployed file SHA256 is the canonical identity of the running script.

patches_applied.patch: v1: source breadth/median from microstructure_log.r_m5 (snapshot.r_m5 is NULL)
v2: per-candidate r_m5 from micro, add pool_size_total/pool_size_with_micro
patches_applied.schema_change: DROP TABLE + recreate with pool_size_total, pool_size_with_micro columns
